FreeText: Absolutely loved it. The rooftop bar has the most spectacular skyline views I have seen anywhere. Boutique feel in the heart of the city — you never feel like just another guest. The concierge recommendations were spot on. This is exactly the kind of intimate, personal experience I look for when I travel. Will definitely be back.

Decent enough but not really my style. The resort is very large and it shows — the pool area was absolutely chaotic on the weekend, no room to relax at all. Too crowded for my taste. Staff were fine but everything felt impersonal and rushed. The theme park proximity is great for families but I would look for somewhere quieter and more intimate next time.
